title: Monitor observed comms change
body: Monitor observed collaboration-state change. active claims: 4 (Hushed Shrouding Mist: Finish cost-of-collaboration P0.QG flaky-test investigation, clean check profiles, and scoped continuity evidence only.; Stratospheric Winging Wing: Prune redundant jc-* skills after extracting useful material; decide disposition for patterns, finishing-branch, and eph; Stratospheric Winging Wing: Rehome patterns and review-skill residue into canonical directive/executive docs during skill pruning.; Galactic Transiting Galaxy: Run session handoff and commit owner-requested stale comms-event curation without absorbing peer skill-pruning source ed) fresh surfaces: comms-events: e3458676-ca58-4d20-94b1-2e2221a6275b.json, 661545b0-b4a3-4908-a181-981d36b480de.json, ca92185d-cce8-4acb-8cc0-7fd44750a385.json | comms-messages: 198ee1a4-85d9-4313-af7a-bd3e2e49a9d3.json, 8a8811b0-c4bf-453e-b440-358b797fc057.json, 743cb9a7-0170-47a2-95e1-e0f1f85c60e6.json | conversations: pr-87-vercel-ignore-test-failures-prismatic-sidebar.json, pr-87-phases-3-6-vining-bending-root.json, ws3a-decision-thread-open.example.json | escalations: README.md Continuing 30-second non-blocking polling; no blocker.
